MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF CO,MPLAINT FOR DAMAGES FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAYLOR, MACINA

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NORETHA JONES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF RENT ORDINANCE SUSTAIN. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING SUSTAIN. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS SUSTAIN. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGED RENT INCREASE SUSTAIN. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION RETALIATORY EVICTION OVERRULE. (NOTE: THE TENTATIVE RULING AS TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS IN ERROR - SHOULD READ AS SUSTAIN NOT OVERRULE.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/AJR/KS(EX)) COURT REPORTER JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR#4780

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NORETHA JONES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
APPEAR: Mary J. Bosworth, Esq. 433-4800 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court ruled as follows: DEMURRER TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION VIOLATION OF RENT ORDINANCE SUSTAIN. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF COVENANT OF GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING SUSTAIN. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS SUSTAIN. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION ALLEGED RENT INCREASE SUSTAIN. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION RETALIATORY EVICTION OVERRULE. (Note: The tentative ruling as to the 8th cause of action is in error - should read as sustain not overrule.) Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/KS(EX)) Court Reporter Joe Vickstein, CSR#4780
